name: Building Microservices
description: Sam Newman's guide to designing fine-grained systems. The reference for splitting monoliths into services that actually scale at the edge.

name: MacBook Pro 14" (M4 Pro)
description: 16GB unified memory, 512GB SSD. The default laptop of every developer who deploys to Cloudflare Workers.

name: Uplift V2 Standing Desk
description: Electric sit-stand desk with bamboo top. Because your spine deserves the same uptime as your Workers.

name: Keychron Q1 Pro
description: Wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches and QMK/VIA support. Clicky keys, quiet deploys.

name: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: Martin Kleppmann's original deep dive into the principles behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems. The distributed-systems bible.

name: LG 34" UltraWide Monitor
description: 3440×1440 IPS panel with USB-C passthrough. Enough horizontal space to read docs, logs, and HAR files side by side.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation for deep focus during incident response or writing Durable Object migrations.

name: Crafting Interpreters
description: Robert Nystrom walks you through building a language from scratch — lexer to bytecode VM. Perfect weekend reading between deploys.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S
description: Ergonomic mouse with MagSpeed scroll wheel and multi-device switching. Pairs well with three terminal tabs and a dashboard.

name: Ergotron LX Monitor Arm
description: VESA mount that frees desk space and lets you tilt your screen away from the afternoon glare on your standing desk.

name: Modern C++ Design
description: Andrei Alexandrescu's classic on policy-based design and template metaprogramming. For when your hot path needs zero-cost abstractions.

name: Ember Smart Mug 2
description: Temperature-controlled ceramic mug. Keeps your coffee hot through long wrangler dev sessions and cold starts.

name: CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt Dock
description: 18 ports of connectivity chaos, neatly organized. One cable back to the MacBook when you return from the kitchen.

name: Herman Miller Aeron (Remastered)
description: The chair your company won't buy you. Posture support for engineers who spend more time in chairs than in meetings.

name: Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB)
description: A pocket-sized server for prototyping edge workloads before you graduate to Workers and Durable Objects.
